All fixes applied and service is running. Here's a summary:

**Fix 1 — Task status derivation** (`src/services/task.ts`): Added `deriveStatus()` that walks `data.log[]` when `data.status` is absent. Falls through: `done`/`failed`/`blocked` log events map directly; everything else becomes `in_progress`. Also derives `startedAt`, `finishedAt`, and `summary` from log entries when the top-level fields are missing.

**Fix 2 — GetSession double-encoding** (`src/services/congress.ts`): No change needed...(truncated)
